[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: 30 Old Black and White Photos of Men Working the Mines | eBaum's World
[METADATA/INTRO]: While we immerse ourselves in the hustle and bustle of the world above ground, we often forget about the necessary work going on beneath it; the collection of our rare and essential natural resources. There are few tougher and more...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: While we immerse ourselves in the hustle and bustle of the world above ground, we often forget about the necessary work going on beneath it; the collection of our rare and essential natural resources. 
 There are few tougher and more hazardous professions than mining, and it's safe to say the mining companies of old didn't care. 
 Social media claims that the children yearn for the mines, but if that's the case, those kids should take a look through these vintage black and white photos of miners from the past. 
 Coal Miners coming up a coal mine elevator after a day of work in 1920's Belgium.
